name: Unbxd AI-Powered E-Commerce Search API
what_it_does: AI-powered e-commerce product search and discovery platform with REST API — enabling retailers to implement intelligent search (with NLP, autocomplete, spell correction), personalized product recommendations, and analytics-driven merchandising, with a feed-based product catalog ingestion system and real-time behavioral analytics for conversion optimization.
use_cases: Implementing AI product search via Unbxd API for e-commerce site search with NLP
Building personalized product recommendations via Unbxd for homepage and PDP widgets
Ingesting product catalog via Unbxd Feed API for real-time product data sync
Implementing autocomplete search via Unbxd for high-conversion type-ahead search
Tracking user search behavior via Unbxd Analytics API for merchandising optimization
not_for: General-purpose text search beyond e-commerce products (use Algolia or Elasticsearch)
Small catalogs below 1,000 products without personalization needs (Searchanise or Doofinder simpler)
Non-retail search use cases (Unbxd is exclusively e-commerce product discovery)
best_when: A mid-to-large e-commerce retailer needs AI-powered product search, recommendations, and personalized merchandising — where Unbxd combines search relevance, behavioral personalization, and catalog intelligence for improved product discovery conversion.
avoid_when: You're a small retailer, need general-purpose search, or don't have the catalog size and traffic to benefit from AI personalization.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Site key for front-end search queries (public). Secret key for feed/catalog management API (server-side only). No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Keys from Unbxd dashboard. JavaScript search library for front-end integration. Feed API for catalog ingestion (server-side). Behavioral events via analytics API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial/demo available
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise SaaS — custom pricing based on GMV/search volume; typically $1,500-5,000+/month
pricing.notes: Indian company (Bangalore). Founded 2012 by Prashant Kumar and Pavan Sondur. Raised $46M total (Series B $25M, Mango Capital 2022). 200+ mid-enterprise retailers. Customers: Puma, Columbia, Forever 21, Aldo, Crutchfield. MACH Alliance member. Uses AI/ML for search ranking (not pure BM25). Personalization engine. Merchandising rules (boost/bury/pin products). Faceted search. Analytics and A/B testing. Adobe Commerce (Magento) and Shopify integrations. Strong in US mid-market and India enterprise. Competing with Constructor.io, Bloomreach, Coveo.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise agreement defines limits; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with site key (public) and secret key (server). JS library for front-end. No webhooks. SOC2/GDPR. Enterprise subscription. Indian company. Annual contract. Feed-based catalog ingestion model. Behavioral events tracking.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries fully idempotent. Catalog feed: full replace or delta updates — both idempotent with product ID as key. Behavioral event tracking: events are append-only (not idempotent — avoid duplicates).
known_agent_gotchas: Two key types: site key (public search queries) vs secret key (catalog management) — never expose secret key
Catalog ingestion is feed-based (JSON/CSV upload) — not real-time product PUT/PATCH endpoints
Search API returns product IDs — join with your product catalog for full product data
Behavioral events (clicks, add-to-cart) must be tracked via analytics API for personalization to work
Annual enterprise contract required — no self-service for production API access
Indian company — US and EU data residency available but check contract for data location

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, GDPR compliant. Site key (public) vs secret key (server-side) separation. No OAuth2 scope granularity. US/EU data residency. Behavioral data (click streams, search queries) is sensitive — GDPR consent required. Annual enterprise contract includes data processing terms.
